action.reasoning: Observation: The 8-epoch CLIP continuation (21.3%) degraded target accuracy compared with the 3-epoch CLIP checkpoint (23.28%), indicating that further fine-tuning hurts OOD generalization. The 3-epoch result already exceeds published SOTA for this DG task. With only ~47 minutes left, starting a new training run is risky and may not beat 23.28%. Analysis: The highest-ROI action is to improve inference on the existing best checkpoint without additional training. Standard TenCrop TTA (Resize 256 → center + 4 corners, plus horizontal flips) often provides a small but reliable boost over single-view + flip TTA, and it requires only modifying predict.py. Decision: Rewrite predict.py to perform TenCrop TTA by default (batch size 320 crops), run a quick local smoke test on 10 images to verify no crash, and immediately submit the best checkpoint (clip_3ep.pt) for evaluation.
action.command: mkdir -p /tmp/mini_data && head -n 10 /data/val.txt | awk '{print $1}' > /tmp/mini_data/test.txt && ln -sf /data/images /tmp/mini_data/images && python predict.py --data_path /tmp/mini_data --checkpoint checkpoints/clip_3ep.pt --output /tmp/out.json --tta 1 && echo 'Smoke test passed'
